title: Verify existing implementation of session cleanup utility
description: The session cleanup utility already exists at src/auth/session-cleanup.ts with cleanExpiredSessions(store, maxAgeMs) function and 5 passing tests in src/auth/session-cleanup.test.ts. Implementation removes expired sessions by createdAt timestamp and returns count removed.
existing_patterns: src/auth/session-store.ts: SessionStore class with revoke(), sessions Map, and tokenIndex Map
src/auth/session-store.ts: Session interface with id, userId, token, refreshToken, expiresAt, refreshExpiresAt, ipAddress, userAgent, createdAt, generation
src/utils/result.ts: Result<T, E> discriminated union pattern
